response.justification: Bogdan possesses a strong general engineering background with over 15 years of experience, a solid foundation in multiple languages, and recent exposure to AI infrastructure. However, this Principal-level role specifically requires deep domain expertise in enterprise-scale growth and experimentation systems. His resume lacks any mention of A/B testing platforms, feature flagging, telemetry foundations, or statistical analysis workflows, making him unsuitable for this highly specialized IC6 position despite his strong technical pedigree.
strengths: Extensive software engineering experience (15+ years) across a wide variety of languages including JS/TS, C/C++, Java, and DLang.
Proven ability to build high-scale systems, demonstrated by his work handling millions of requests per second at Dunnhumby.
Recent hands-on experience building AI-agent infrastructure and developer tooling, fulfilling the preferred qualification for AI tool usage.
concerns: Complete lack of demonstrated experience in building or scaling growth, A/B testing, or experimentation platforms.
No evidence of the required data aptitude related to telemetry, feature flighting, or statistical analysis methods.
Most recent leadership experience is at the Staff/Senior level within smaller companies, which may not translate to the enterprise-scale cross-functional leadership expected of an IC6 Principal.
